option.name: originalContent
option.value:
const en_US: Record<string, string> = { "app.name": "Orbital", "app.description": "Renārs Ozoliņš | Senior Project of 2026",
"nav.home": "Home", "nav.register": "Register", "nav.login": "Login", "nav.logout": "Logout", "nav.workspaces": "Workspaces", "nav.teams": "Teams", "nav.profile": "Profile",
"common.save": "Save", "common.cancel": "Cancel", "common.delete": "Delete", "common.edit": "Edit", "common.back": "Back", "common.create": "Create", "common.loading": "Loading...", "common.none": "None", "common.yes": "Yes", "common.no": "No", "common.reset": "Reset", "common.set": "Set", "common.invite": "Invite", "common.submit": "Submit", "common.join": "Join", "common.id": "ID",
"auth.username": "Username", "auth.password": "Password", "auth.displayName": "Display Name", "auth.login": "Login", "auth.register": "Register", "auth.logout": "Logout", "auth.enterUsername": "Enter your username or email", "auth.enterPassword": "Enter your password", "auth.enterDisplayName": "Enter your display name", "auth.confirmPassword": "Confirm Password", "auth.confirmPasswordPlaceholder": "Re-enter your password", "auth.passwordsDoNotMatch": "Passwords do not match", "auth.loginFailed": "Unable to login. Please try again.", "auth.registrationFailed": "Registration failed", "auth.togglePasswordVisibility": "toggle password visibility",
"teams.title": "Teams", "teams.create": "Create Team", "teams.createTeam": "Create Team", "teams.createNewTeam": "Create a new team", "teams.enterTeamName": "Enter team name", "teams.manage": "Manage Team", "teams.selectTeam": "Select Team", "teams.noTeams": "No teams found.", "teams.teamName": "Team Name", "teams.invitedTo": "You've been invited to {teamName}!", "teams.joinTeamDescription": "Join the team to collaborate on projects and tasks.",
"teams.sidebar.members": "Members", "teams.sidebar.invite": "Invite", "teams.sidebar.roles": "Roles", "teams.sidebar.settings": "Settings", "teams.sidebar.dangerZone": "Danger Zone",
"teams.members.title": "Members", "teams.members.noMembers": "No members found.", "teams.members.owner": "(Owner)", "teams.members.you": "(You)", "teams.members.role": "Role", "teams.members.noRole": "No role", "teams.members.saveRole": "Save Role", "teams.members.permissionOverrides": "Permission Overrides", "teams.members.savePermissions": "Save Permissions", "teams.members.overrides": "Overrides:", "teams.members.roleUpdated": "Role updated", "teams.members.roleUpdateFailed": "Failed to update role", "teams.members.permissionsUpdated": "Permissions updated", "teams.members.permissionsUpdateFailed": "Failed to update permissions", "teams.members.permissionsReset": "Permissions reset", "teams.members.permissionsResetFailed": "Failed to reset permissions",
"teams.roles.title": "Roles", "teams.roles.createRole": "Create Role", "teams.roles.createNewRole": "Create New Role", "teams.roles.roleName": "Role Name", "teams.roles.enterRoleName": "Enter role name", "teams.roles.noRoles": "No roles found. Create one to get started.", "teams.roles.priority": "Priority", "teams.roles.priorityHint": "Lower number = higher authority", "teams.roles.permissions": "Permissions", "teams.roles.loadingPermissions": "Loading permissions...", "teams.roles.roleCreated": "Role created", "teams.roles.roleCreateFailed": "Failed to create role", "teams.roles.roleUpdated": "Role updated", "teams.roles.roleUpdateFailed": "Failed to update role", "teams.roles.roleDeleted": "Role deleted", "teams.roles.roleDeleteFailed": "Failed to delete role", "teams.roles.priorityUpdated": "Priority updated", "teams.roles.priorityUpdateFailed": "Failed to update priority",
"teams.invite.title": "Invite User", "teams.invite.placeholder": "Username", "teams.invite.success": "User invited", "teams.invite.failed": "Failed to invite user",
"teams.settings.title": "Team Settings", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdated": "Team name updated", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdateFailed": "Failed to update team",
"teams.danger.title": "Danger Zone", "teams.danger.warning": "Deleting this team is irreversible. All data will be lost.", "teams.danger.deleteTeam": "Delete Team", "teams.danger.teamDeleted": "Team deleted", "teams.danger.teamDeleteFailed": "Failed to delete team",
"permissions.ownerOnly": "(Owner Only)", "permissions.adminOnly": "(Admin Only)", "permissions.manage_permissions": "Manage Permissions", "permissions.manage_members": "Manage Members", "permissions.manage_team": "Manage Team", "permissions.admin": "Admin",
"workspaces.title": "Workspaces", "workspaces.create": "Create Workspace", "workspaces.createWorkspace": "Create Workspace", "workspaces.noWorkspaces": "No workspaces found.", "workspaces.name": "Name", "workspaces.enterName": "Workspace Name", "workspaces.underTeam": "Under Team", "workspaces.selectTeam": "Select Team", "workspaces.noTeam": "No Team", "workspaces.edit": "Edit Workspace", "workspaces.editTitle": "Edit Workspace:", "workspaces.allowedRoles": "Allowed Roles", "workspaces.allowedRolesDescription": "Select which roles can access this workspace.", "workspaces.addRole": "Add Role", "workspaces.removeRole": "Remove Role", "workspaces.noRolesAssigned": "No roles assigned. All team members can access this workspace.", "workspaces.roleAdded": "Role added to workspace", "workspaces.roleAddFailed": "Failed to add role", "workspaces.roleRemoved": "Role removed from workspace", "workspaces.roleRemoveFailed": "Failed to remove role", "workspaces.notTeamWorkspace": "This is not a team workspace and cannot be edited.", "workspaces.availableRoles": "Available Roles", "workspaces.currentRoles": "Current Roles",
"calendar.title": "Calendar", "calendar.today": "Today", "calendar.event": "Event", "calendar.noEvents": "No Events", "calendar.noEventsForDay": "No events for this day.", "calendar.availableEvents": "Available Events", "calendar.createEvent": "Create Event", "calendar.setTitle": "Set title", "calendar.setDueDate": "Set due date", "calendar.dueDate": "Due date", "calendar.due": "Due", "calendar.close": "Close", "calendar.label": "Label", "calendar.manageLabels": "Manage Labels", "calendar.createLabel": "Create Label", "calendar.labelName": "Label name", "calendar.existingLabels": "Existing Labels", "calendar.attendees": "Attendees", "calendar.month.january": "January", "calendar.month.february": "February", "calendar.month.march": "March", "calendar.month.april": "April", "calendar.month.may": "May", "calendar.month.june": "June", "calendar.month.july": "July", "calendar.month.august": "August", "calendar.month.september": "September", "calendar.month.october": "October", "calendar.month.november": "November", "calendar.month.december": "December", "calendar.day.sunday": "Sunday", "calendar.day.monday": "Monday", "calendar.day.tuesday": "Tuesday", "calendar.day.wednesday": "Wednesday", "calendar.day.thursday": "Thursday", "calendar.day.friday": "Friday", "calendar.day.saturday": "Saturday", "calendar.day.sun": "Sun", "calendar.day.mon": "Mon", "calendar.day.tue": "Tue", "calendar.day.wed": "Wed", "calendar.day.thu": "Thu", "calendar.day.fri": "Fri", "calendar.day.sat": "Sat",
"language.switch": "Language", "language.en_US": "English", "language.lv_LV": "Latvian",
"error.badRequest": "Bad request", "error.unauthorized": "Unauthorized", "error.notFound": "Not found", "error.serverError": "Server error", "error.unknown": "Unknown error", };
export default en_US;

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
const en_US: Record<string, string> = { "app.name": "Orbital", "app.description": "Renārs Ozoliņš | Senior Project of 2026",
"nav.home": "Home", "nav.register": "Register", "nav.login": "Login", "nav.logout": "Logout", "nav.workspaces": "Workspaces", "nav.teams": "Teams", "nav.profile": "Profile",
"common.save": "Save", "common.cancel": "Cancel", "common.delete": "Delete", "common.edit": "Edit", "common.back": "Back", "common.create": "Create", "common.loading": "Loading...", "common.none": "None", "common.yes": "Yes", "common.no": "No", "common.reset": "Reset", "common.set": "Set", "common.invite": "Invite", "common.submit": "Submit", "common.join": "Join", "common.id": "ID",
"auth.username": "Username", "auth.password": "Password", "auth.displayName": "Display Name", "auth.login": "Login", "auth.register": "Register", "auth.logout": "Logout", "auth.enterUsername": "Enter your username or email", "auth.enterPassword": "Enter your password", "auth.enterDisplayName": "Enter your display name", "auth.confirmPassword": "Confirm Password", "auth.confirmPasswordPlaceholder": "Re-enter your password", "auth.passwordsDoNotMatch": "Passwords do not match", "auth.loginFailed": "Unable to login. Please try again.", "auth.registrationFailed": "Registration failed", "auth.togglePasswordVisibility": "toggle password visibility",
"teams.title": "Teams", "teams.create": "Create Team", "teams.createTeam": "Create Team", "teams.createNewTeam": "Create a new team", "teams.enterTeamName": "Enter team name", "teams.manage": "Manage Team", "teams.selectTeam": "Select Team", "teams.noTeams": "No teams found.", "teams.teamName": "Team Name", "teams.invitedTo": "You've been invited to {teamName}!", "teams.joinTeamDescription": "Join the team to collaborate on projects and tasks.",
"teams.sidebar.members": "Members", "teams.sidebar.invite": "Invite", "teams.sidebar.roles": "Roles", "teams.sidebar.settings": "Settings", "teams.sidebar.dangerZone": "Danger Zone",

"teams.invite.title": "Invite User", "teams.invite.placeholder": "Username", "teams.invite.success": "User invited", "teams.invite.failed": "Failed to invite user",
"teams.settings.title": "Team Settings", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdated": "Team name updated", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdateFailed": "Failed to update team",

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
const lv_LV: Record<string, string> = { "app.name": "Orbital", "app.description": "Renārs Ozoliņš | Pēdējais skolas projekts 2026. Gadam",
"nav.home": "Sākums", "nav.register": "Reģistrēties", "nav.login": "Pieslēgties", "nav.logout": "Izrakstīties", "nav.workspaces": "Darba vietas", "nav.teams": "Komandas", "nav.profile": "Profils",
"common.save": "Saglabāt", "common.cancel": "Atcelt", "common.delete": "Dzēst", "common.edit": "Rediģēt", "common.back": "Atpakaļ", "common.create": "Izveidot", "common.loading": "Ielādē...", "common.none": "Nav", "common.yes": "Jā", "common.no": "Nē", "common.reset": "Atiestatīt", "common.set": "Iestatīt", "common.invite": "Uzaicināt", "common.submit": "Iesniegt", "common.join": "Pievienoties", "common.id": "ID",
"auth.username": "Lietotājvārds", "auth.password": "Parole", "auth.displayName": "Parādāmais vārds", "auth.login": "Pieslēgties", "auth.register": "Reģistrēties", "auth.logout": "Izrakstīties", "auth.enterUsername": "Ievadiet lietotājvārdu vai e-pastu", "auth.enterPassword": "Ievadiet paroli", "auth.enterDisplayName": "Ievadiet parādāmo vārdu", "auth.confirmPassword": "Apstipriniet paroli", "auth.confirmPasswordPlaceholder": "Ievadiet paroli vēlreiz", "auth.passwordsDoNotMatch": "Paroles nesakrīt", "auth.loginFailed": "Neizdevās pieslēgties. Lūdzu, mēģiniet vēlreiz.", "auth.registrationFailed": "Reģistrācija neizdevās", "auth.togglePasswordVisibility": "pārslēgt paroles redzamību",
"teams.title": "Komandas", "teams.create": "Izveidot komandu", "teams.createTeam": "Izveidot komandu", "teams.createNewTeam": "Izveidot jaunu komandu", "teams.enterTeamName": "Ievadiet komandas nosaukumu", "teams.manage": "Pārvaldīt komandu", "teams.selectTeam": "Izvēlieties komandu", "teams.noTeams": "Komandas nav atrastas.", "teams.teamName": "Komandas nosaukums", "teams.invitedTo": "Jūs esat uzaicināts komandā {teamName}!", "teams.joinTeamDescription": "Pievienojieties komandai, lai sadarbotos projektos un uzdevumos.",
"teams.sidebar.members": "Dalībnieki", "teams.sidebar.invite": "Uzaicināt", "teams.sidebar.roles": "Lomas", "teams.sidebar.settings": "Iestatījumi", "teams.sidebar.dangerZone": "Bīstamā zona",
"teams.members.title": "Dalībnieki", "teams.members.noMembers": "Dalībnieki nav atrasti.", "teams.members.owner": "(Īpašnieks)", "teams.members.you": "(Tu)", "teams.members.role": "Loma", "teams.members.noRole": "Nav lomas", "teams.members.saveRole": "Saglabāt lomu", "teams.members.permissionOverrides": "Atļauju pārrakstīšana", "teams.members.savePermissions": "Saglabāt atļaujas", "teams.members.overrides": "Pārrakstīšanas:", "teams.members.roleUpdated": "Loma atjaunināta", "teams.members.roleUpdateFailed": "Neizdevās atjaunināt lomu", "teams.members.permissionsUpdated": "Atļaujas atjauninātas", "teams.members.permissionsUpdateFailed": "Neizdevās atjaunināt atļaujas", "teams.members.permissionsReset": "Atļaujas atiestatītas", "teams.members.permissionsResetFailed": "Neizdevās atiestatīt atļaujas",
"teams.roles.title": "Lomas", "teams.roles.createRole": "Izveidot lomu", "teams.roles.createNewRole": "Izveidot jaunu lomu", "teams.roles.roleName": "Lomas nosaukums", "teams.roles.enterRoleName": "Ievadiet lomas nosaukumu", "teams.roles.noRoles": "Lomas nav atrastas. Izveidojiet vienu, lai sāktu.", "teams.roles.priority": "Prioritāte", "teams.roles.priorityHint": "Mazāks skaitlis = augstāka autoritāte", "teams.roles.permissions": "Atļaujas", "teams.roles.loadingPermissions": "Ielādē atļaujas...", "teams.roles.roleCreated": "Loma izveidota", "teams.roles.roleCreateFailed": "Neizdevās izveidot lomu", "teams.roles.roleUpdated": "Loma atjaunināta", "teams.roles.roleUpdateFailed": "Neizdevās atjaunināt lomu", "teams.roles.roleDeleted": "Loma dzēsta", "teams.roles.roleDeleteFailed": "Neizdevās dzēst lomu", "teams.roles.priorityUpdated": "Prioritāte atjaunināta", "teams.roles.priorityUpdateFailed": "Neizdevās atjaunināt prioritāti",
"teams.invite.title": "Uzaicināt lietotāju", "teams.invite.placeholder": "Lietotājvārds", "teams.invite.success": "Lietotājs uzaicināts", "teams.invite.failed": "Neizdevās uzaicināt lietotāju",
"teams.settings.title": "Komandas iestatījumi", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdated": "Komandas nosaukums atjaunināts", "teams.settings.teamNameUpdateFailed": "Neizdevās atjaunināt komandu",
"teams.danger.title": "Bīstamā zona", "teams.danger.warning": "Komandas dzēšana ir neatgriezeniska. Visi dati tiks zaudēti.", "teams.danger.deleteTeam": "Dzēst komandu", "teams.danger.teamDeleted": "Komanda dzēsta", "teams.danger.teamDeleteFailed": "Neizdevās dzēst komandu",
"permissions.ownerOnly": "(Tikai īpašniekam)", "permissions.adminOnly": "(Tikai administratoram)", "permissions.manage_permissions": "Pārvaldīt atļaujas", "permissions.manage_members": "Pārvaldīt dalībniekus", "permissions.manage_team": "Pārvaldīt komandu", "permissions.admin": "Administrators",
"workspaces.title": "Darba vietas", "workspaces.create": "Izveidot darba vietu", "workspaces.createWorkspace": "Izveidot darba vietu", "workspaces.noWorkspaces": "Darba vietas nav atrastas.", "workspaces.name": "Nosaukums", "workspaces.enterName": "Darba vietas nosaukums", "workspaces.underTeam": "Zem komandas", "workspaces.selectTeam": "Izvēlēties komandu", "workspaces.noTeam": "Nav komandas", "workspaces.edit": "Rediģēt darba vietu", "workspaces.editTitle": "Rediģēt darba vietu:", "workspaces.allowedRoles": "Atļautās lomas", "workspaces.allowedRolesDescription": "Izvēlieties, kuras lomas var piekļūt šai darba vietai.", "workspaces.addRole": "Pievienot lomu", "workspaces.removeRole": "Noņemt lomu", "workspaces.noRolesAssigned": "Nav piešķirtas lomas. Visi komandas dalībnieki var piekļūt šai darba vietai.", "workspaces.roleAdded": "Loma pievienota darba vietai", "workspaces.roleAddFailed": "Neizdevās pievienot lomu", "workspaces.roleRemoved": "Loma noņemta no darba vietas", "workspaces.roleRemoveFailed": "Neizdevās noņemt lomu", "workspaces.notTeamWorkspace": "Šī nav komandas darba vieta un to nevar rediģēt.", "workspaces.availableRoles": "Pieejamās lomas", "workspaces.currentRoles": "Pašreizējās lomas",
"calendar.title": "Kalendārs", "calendar.today": "Šodien", "calendar.event": "Notikums", "calendar.noEvents": "Nav notikumu", "calendar.noEventsForDay": "Nav notikumu šajā dienā.", "calendar.availableEvents": "Pieejamie notikumi", "calendar.createEvent": "Izveidot notikumu", "calendar.setTitle": "Iestatīt nosaukumu", "calendar.setDueDate": "Iestatīt termiņu", "calendar.dueDate": "Termiņš", "calendar.due": "Termiņš", "calendar.close": "Aizvērt", "calendar.label": "Iezīme", "calendar.manageLabels": "Pārvaldīt iezīmes", "calendar.createLabel": "Izveidot iezīmi", "calendar.labelName": "Iezīmes nosaukums", "calendar.existingLabels": "Esošās iezīmes", "calendar.attendees": "Dalībnieki", "calendar.month.january": "Janvāris", "calendar.month.february": "Februāris", "calendar.month.march": "Marts", "calendar.month.april": "Aprīlis", "calendar.month.may": "Maijs", "calendar.month.june": "Jūnijs", "calendar.month.july": "Jūlijs", "calendar.month.august": "Augusts", "calendar.month.september": "Septembris", "calendar.month.october": "Oktobris", "calendar.month.november": "Novembris", "calendar.month.december": "Decembris", "calendar.day.sunday": "Svētdiena", "calendar.day.monday": "Pirmdiena", "calendar.day.tuesday": "Otrdiena", "calendar.day.wednesday": "Trešdiena", "calendar.day.thursday": "Ceturtdiena", "calendar.day.friday": "Piektdiena", "calendar.day.saturday": "Sestdiena", "calendar.day.sun": "Sv", "calendar.day.mon": "Pr", "calendar.day.tue": "Ot", "calendar.day.wed": "Tr", "calendar.day.thu": "Ce", "calendar.day.fri": "Pk", "calendar.day.sat": "Se",
"language.switch": "Valoda", "language.en_US": "Angļu", "language.lv_LV": "Latviešu",
"error.badRequest": "Nepareizs pieprasījums", "error.unauthorized": "Neautorizēts", "error.notFound": "Nav atrasts", "error.serverError": "Servera kļūda", "error.unknown": "Nezināma kļūda", };
export default lv_LV;

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
const lv_LV: Record<string, string> = { "app.name": "Orbital", "app.description": "Renārs Ozoliņš | Pēdējais skolas projekts 2026. Gadam",
